hero.headline: Web & Software Solutions

trust.title: Trusted by businesses that need results

why.title: Why Businesses Choose CM Studio
why.subtitle: We combine creative quality with technical depth to deliver digital products that actually work for your business.

items.title: Tailored Solutions
items.description: Every project is designed around the client's real business goals, not generic templates.

items.title: SEO Optimized

items.title: Mobile First
items.description: Designed to look and work beautifully on mobile, tablet, and desktop — no exceptions.

items.title: High Performance
items.description: Fast loading, optimized assets, clean structure, and Core Web Vitals always in mind.

items.title: Direct Communication

items.title: Scalable Architecture
items.description: Solutions designed to evolve from landing pages to full platforms, dashboards, and applications.

projects.title: Selected Work That Solves Real Business Problems
projects.subtitle: A curated selection of digital products built to solve real challenges.

items.title: Café Kosoalt Landing Page
items.description: A premium landing page for a Salvadoran coffee brand, focused on product presentation, flavor selection, WhatsApp orders, and local/international shipping messaging.

details.goal: Create a modern landing page that presents Café Kosoalt as a premium Salvadoran coffee brand and makes it easy for customers to place orders through WhatsApp.
details.problem: The brand needed a clear digital presence to showcase flavors, product options, shipping information, and collect order details without a complex e-commerce setup.
details.solution: Built a responsive landing page with a strong coffee-inspired visual identity, flavor cards, product presentation, shipping section, and a WhatsApp order form with pre-filled customer information.
details.impact: A polished ordering experience that helps the brand present its products professionally and guide customers directly to WhatsApp for purchase confirmation.

items.title: Lele Creative Studio
items.description: A creative portfolio website for a graphic designer and brand studio, focused on showcasing visual work, services, projects, and contact.

details.goal: Create a creative online presence that attracts new clients and showcases the studio's visual identity.
details.problem: The client had no digital presence and needed a site that reflected their brand quality.
details.solution: Designed a bold, image-forward landing page with clear sections for work, services, and contact.
details.impact: Professional online presence ready to attract design clients.

items.title: R&M Quality Service
items.description: A delivery and courier service website with a request form designed to store order information automatically in Google Sheets.

details.goal: Digitalize the order reception process and eliminate manual data entry.
details.problem: Orders came via WhatsApp with no organized tracking or follow-up system.
details.solution: Built a business website with an order form that sends data directly to Google Sheets for tracking.
details.impact: Reduced manual work and created a centralized order management system.

items.title: OT Data Centers
items.description: A professional website concept for a fiber optic and data center infrastructure company in Virginia, USA.

details.goal: Establish a credible B2B web presence for an infrastructure company in the US market.
details.problem: No website existed, making it hard to convert leads from referrals and outreach.
details.solution: Designed a professional, enterprise-grade website concept focused on services, trust, and contact.
details.impact: Enterprise-ready digital presence for US infrastructure market.

items.title: Glasswing Volunteer Platform
items.description: A volunteer management platform with multi-role access, authentication, training flows, document handling, country-based coordination, reporting, and integrations.

details.goal: Build a scalable volunteer management system for a regional NGO.
details.problem: Volunteers across countries were managed via email and spreadsheets with no unified system.
details.solution: Custom WordPress-based web application with admin/volunteer roles, training steps, document uploads, and Google Calendar integration.
details.impact: Centralized volunteer operations across multiple countries.

items.title: AC Sports Store
items.description: A sports e-commerce project concept with product categories, catalog structure, WooCommerce planning, and store setup strategy.

details.goal: Create an online store strategy for a local sports equipment retailer.
details.problem: Sales were only in-person with no capability to reach online customers.
details.solution: Designed an e-commerce concept with product catalog, category structure, and checkout flow planning.
details.impact: Roadmap for digital sales channel with clear implementation phases.

process.title: A Clear Process From Idea to Launch
process.subtitle: Every project follows the same structured approach — so you always know where things stand.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.description: We understand your business, goals, audience, and project needs before writing a single line of code.

steps.title: Strategy
steps.description: We define scope, structure, features, content, timeline, and priorities so there are no surprises.

steps.title: Design
steps.description: We create a modern user experience focused on clarity, trust, and conversion for your audience.

steps.title: Development
steps.description: We build the project with responsive design, performance, SEO, and all agreed functionality in mind.

steps.title: Launch
steps.description: We deploy, test, optimize, and prepare the project for real users and search engines.

steps.title: Support
steps.description: Optional support, improvements, maintenance, and future phases to keep your product growing.

about.title: Behind CM Studio
about.description: CM Studio is led by Carlos Montalvo, a digital solutions builder with experience in web development, IT support, business, marketing, infrastructure, integrations, and digital platforms.
about.bio: With a background in Marketing and Business complemented by hands-on technical training, Carlos bridges the gap between business strategy and digital execution. Every project is approached with commercial awareness, technical depth, and a focus on real outcomes for clients.

contact.title: Let's Build Your Next Digital Product
contact.description: Tell us about your project and we'll help you define the best solution, timeline, and next step.
